title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 32.
content:
There was an Old Man of Vienna,
    Who lived upon Tincture of Senna;
    When that did not agree,
    He took Camomile Tea,
    That nasty Old Man of Vienna.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 32."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
